mapper.select:
SELECT a.* , a.inst_id AS instId FROM sys_inst a, (SELECT b.inst_id FROM sys_inst b WHERE b.is_deleted=0
AND (b.inst_id=#{parentId} OR b.parent_id=#{parentId})
GROUP BY b.inst_id ) c WHERE a.newlevel=0 AND a.inst_id=c.inst_id
SELECT a.name, a.inst_no, a.remarks, b.name AS parentName FROM sys_inst a LEFT JOIN sys_inst b ON a.parent_id = b.inst_id AND a.is_deleted = 0 WHERE a.newlevel = 0
